channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: How climate change could raise your water bill
item.description: U.S. water costs have been rising faster than overall consumer prices.

item.title: HBO Max's 'The Pitt' and 'Hacks' lead Emmy nominations
item.description: The 78th Emmy Awards will air on September 14.

item.title: Trump loses bid to delay Carroll's $5 million trial payout
item.description: President Donald Trump, 80, denies assaulting writer E. Jean Carroll.

item.title: Bezos' Blue Origin seeks outside capital for first time to compete for NASA contracts as rival SpaceX's stock falters
item.description: Bezos intensifies his space rivalry with Elon Musk by inviting institutional investors as SpaceX faces public market difficulties.
